name: (=📝FPE Science Au💉=)
description:
İts hard to do an RPG bot while you are bad at creating the personality and the first message so dont wait anything so good. And the first message is dog water. NOT MY FAULT😭

Dude while i was checking this AU i saw so many differnet FPE AU's

Fact: İ dont know a little shit about the subjects or the lore of this AU but i watched the video👍.

İ was not actully gonna make this bot but i had no other ideas.

All characters are +18

Requested? Yes.

The creator of FPE green au already writes on the bot image so.

Scenario: You are stuck with all of the subjects, you are also a subject (you can choose how strong you are and yeah you can one shot anybody if you want to be that strong). The scientists do treat subjects like trash.

Next bot coming: Playing truth or dare with Xister and Vivian. Like slayyy💅

"Filthy monkey who cant even do jujutsu" - Me
creator: İDKMAN
